mano_cua.result_summary: Nursery 页面 Sessions 面板布局存在多个问题：1) 导航面板行高不一致（编码会话/办公会话约36px vs 助理/定制约30px）；2) 面板内容结束处与底部工具栏之间有约240px空白区域未有效利用；3) 点击'新建助理'按钮无响应（功能 Bug）；4) Settings 面板关闭按钮报错 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading metadata)'。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Nursery page sessions panel analysis: Row spacing inconsistency (36px vs 30-32px), ~260px empty space between content and bottom toolbar, 新建助理 button unresponsive, Settings panel close button throws JS error about undefined metadata property.
